arguments.argument:
/* Distortion Gate script. This will move the player to the Distortion. */ if global.gamePaused=false { if oKeyCodes.kCodePressed[3]=1 { resetKeyCodes() global.recAreaTrans+=1 global.rmDeaths=0 global.newMapX=newMapX global.newMapY=newMapY writeToPlayerGlobals()
transition_steps=20 transition_kind=21 room_goto(toRoom) } }
